title: Liverpool vs. Fulham - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Liverpool are winless in their last three Premier League games against Fulham. Only once have they had a longer run without a league win against the Cottagers. Fulham have won just two of their 32 away league games against Liverpool, winning 1-0 in both May 2012 and March 2021.

title: Chelsea vs. Manchester City - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Chelsea are winless in their last nine Premier League games against Man City since a 2-1 away win in May 2021. Manchester City have won four of their last five away Premier League games against Chelsea, as many as they had in their previous 26 league visits to Stamford Bridge.

title: Arsenal vs. A.F.C. Bournemouth - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Having won each of their first eight home games against Bournemouth in all competitions, Arsenal lost this exact league fixture 2-1 last season. Bournemouth have won two of their last three league games against Arsenal, more than they had in their previous 14.

title: Manchester United vs. Leeds United - English Premier League 2026/2027
description: Manchester United are unbeaten in their last 18 home league games against Leeds since a 1-0 loss in February 1981 under Dave Sexton. title: Bayern Munchen vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Quarter Finals - 2st leg
description: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. Only once before have they won both legs of a knockout stage tie against them in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League, doing so in the 2000-01 semi-finals. Since the start of the 2013-14 season, Real Madrid have the joint-most away wins against Bayern Munich across all competitions, despite only playing there four times in this period.

title: Osasuna vs Real Betis - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
description: Osasuna have won just one of their last 15 LaLiga matches against Real Betis, a 3-2 victory in April 2023, suffering as many defeats as in their previous 32 top-flight encounters. Real Betis Balompie have won four of their last five away LaLiga matches against Osasuna, including the last two. title: Mallorca vs Rayo Vallecano - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
description: Mallorca have not lost any of their 11 home games against Rayo Vallecano in LaLiga, and have not played more home matches without suffering a defeat against any other opponent in their entire top-flight history. Following their 2-1 victory in Vallecas in January 2026, Rayo Vallecano have the chance to complete a league double over Mallorca for the first time in LaLiga history.

title: Celta de Vigo vs Real Oviedo - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
description: Celta de Vigo are unbeaten in their last two LaLiga matches against Real Oviedo, keeping a clean sheet in both. Never in their history have the Galician side recorded three consecutive clean sheets against the Asturian side in the top-flight. Real Oviedo have not won any of their last nine away LaLiga games against Celta de Vigo, losing on their last six visits. This is their worst run of consecutive away defeats against the Vigo team in the competitions history.

title: Athletic Club vs Villarreal - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
description: Athletic Club are unbeaten in their last six LaLiga home games against Villarreal, never going seven consecutive home matches without a defeat against them in the competition. Villarreal CF are unbeaten in their last two LaLiga games against Athletic Club, keeping a clean sheet in both. The Yellow Submarine have never kept three consecutive clean sheets against the Rojiblancos in the top-flight.

title: Levante vs Getafe - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
description: Levante UD are unbeaten in their last nine home games against Getafe in LaLiga, keeping a clean sheet in the last four of those ; their best run without conceding at home against a single opponent in their entire top-flight history. Getafe CF are unbeaten in their last four LaLiga games against Levante and have only once gone five consecutive matches without defeat against them in the top-flight, which was in their first five encounters between 2004 and 2007.

title: Celta Vigo - Freiburg - QF1 - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 2nd leg
description: Celta Vigo have lost each of their last three games against German sides, while this will be the first time they have hosted a Bundesliga side since March 2007 – a 0-1 defeat to Werder Bremen in the UEFA Cup. Spanish teams have won 10 of their last 11 home major European matches against German teams – but the exception was Real Madrid’s 2-1 defeat to Bayern Munich in the UEFA Champions League this month.

title: Barcelona vs Espanyol - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 31
description: FC Barcelona are unbeaten in their last 29 LaLiga matches against Espanyol, their longest unbeaten run against a single opponent and the longest unbeaten run by a team in any derby in the competitions history. RCD Espanyol have not won an away LaLiga match against FC Barcelona since February 2009 under Mauricio Pochettino. Since then, Espanyol have only picked up one point in their following 14 visits to the Camp Nou in the competition : a 1-1 draw in December 2022.

Rennes vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
description: Rennes have scored in each of their 27 home games against Angers in Ligue 1, the highest tally of home games against the same opponent for a team while scoring every time in the division. title: La Liga Highlights 2025/2026
Olympique Lyonnais vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
description: Lyon have lost just one of their nine Ligue 1 matches against Lorient when Les Merlus have been newly promoted to the top-flight, which was in the reverse fixture this season ; the only time OL have failed to score in such encounters. Lyon have not won any of their last nine matches in all competitions, after winning each of their previous 13. OL have only gone 10 matches without a win in all competitions on three occasions in their history: October-December 1959, April-September 1962 and June-November 2023.

title: Olympique Marseille vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 29
description: Marseille have scored 2.4 goals per game against Metz at home in Ligue 1, their highest average against opponents hosted at least 15 times in the top-flight. Only against St Étienne have OM scored more goals at home in Ligue 1. Marseille have taken just 17 points in Ligue 1 this year, fewer than any other team currently in the top half of the table. In 2026, no team has kept fewer clean sheets than OM in the top-flight.

title: Real Betis vs Sporting Braga - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 2nd leg
description: The only previous European meeting between Real Betis and Sporting Braga was in the first leg of this tie, a 1-1 draw, with Betis unbeaten across their last five European games against Portuguese sides. This is the fourth time Braga have visited Spain for a European match – their one win was in a UEFA Champions League qualifier against Sevilla in August 2010, a 4-3 victory. In their other two, they lost 2-0 to Sevilla in November 2006 in the UEFA Cup and 3-0 against Real Madrid in November 2023 in the UEFA Champions League.

description: Bayern Munich’s victory in the first leg ended a nine-game winless run for them against Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League. description: Aston Villa have kept five consecutive home clean sheets against Italian clubs in major European competition – the last player to score at Villa Park for an Italian team was Zbigniew Boniek in a 2-1 Juventus win in the European Cup in March 1983. title: Celta Vigo - Freiburg - QF1 - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 2nd leg
description: Celta Vigo have lost each of their last three games against German sides, while this will be the first time they have hosted a Bundesliga side since March 2007 – a 0-1 defeat to Werder Bremen in the UEFA Cup. Spanish teams have won 10 of their last 11 home major European matches against German teams – but the exception was Real Madrid’s 2-1 defeat to Bayern Munich in the UEFA Champions League this month.

title: Nottingham Forest vs Porto - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Quarter Finals - 2nd leg
description: Nottingham Forest have faced Portuguese opposition at home just once in European competition, though that came against Porto when they beat them 2-0 at the City Ground back in October in the league phase of this season’s UEFA Europa League. In their major European history, FC Porto have played 24 away matches in England and have never won. Their only ‘away’ win against an English side was against Chelsea in April 2021 in a UEFA Champions League quarter-final second leg, which was played in Seville due to covid-19 restrictions.

Ahead of the weekends action, Sports News provides a preview every Friday of all the latest from the European big leagues. All the latest from the Premier League in England, the Bundesliga in Germany, La Liga in Spain, Serie A in Italy, and Ligue 1 in France

title: Day 5 - ATP 500 BMW Open By Bitpanda - Munich 2026
description: Staged in Munich from 13–19 April at MTTC Iphitos, the ATP 500 clay-court tournament is one of Germany’s oldest events. Featuring a 32-player draw, it offers approximately €595,000 in prize money, with leading players competing for ranking points during the early European clay season.

description: Staged in Munich from 13–19 April at MTTC Iphitos, the ATP 500 clay-court tournament is one of Germany’s oldest events. Featuring a 32-player draw, it offers approximately €595,000 in prize money, with leading players competing for ranking points during the early European clay season.

title: Al Arabi vs Al-Sailiya - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - W17
description: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The most famous participating clubs are Al-Sadd, the champions of the last season; Al-Rayyan and Al-Arabi, the popular teams, Al-Duhail and Al-Gharafa, serious contenders for the title every season. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

title: Montpellier vs Dunkirk - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
description: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germains 11 wins, the competition is fierce.
